title: spec.md (plan/sub-plan) runtime body-structure contract
description: Hook-consumable runtime artifact for plan-tree spec.md files. The k8s ValidatingAdmissionPolicy paramKind for plan spec.md per Plan 81 SP13 Session 2 A23 (alignment/plans-folder-governance.md) + Stream B research (file shapes optimized for LLM consumption). Authored by SP14 Batch A T-13.2 (2026-05-18).

_design_notes.consumer: hooks/pre-write-guard.sh (head-immutable enforcement post Session 1) + librarian capabilities (plan-index / plan-archive)

amendment_pattern: post-Session-1 amendments append as §Session N amendments blocks; body preserved as historical record
